nodes.label: AI overstepping into creative territory

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal voice

nodes.label: Efficient access to information

nodes.grounding_span: I was very satisfied with the police custody example

nodes.label: Frustration with AI overstepping into creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I do find that the AI oversteps with creative suggestions, even when I let it know I'd like to stick to research, and that can be frustrating

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use for business growth
nodes.grounding_span: I think I could utilize it further for growing my business

nodes.label: Iterative follow-up questioning — builds understanding through back-and-forth
